sizing_rule.note: Half optimal f approach: reduce position sizing to 50% of full optimal f fraction to lower account volatility and maximum drawdown at cost of slower compounding. Formula: Account Multiple = (1 + 0.5*f)^N vs full f (1 + f)^N where f is optimal f value.

source_rule_text: Use half of optimal f to reduce account volatility and drawdown, accepting slower growth for less portfolio commotion, though full optimal f continues to outperform over extended trade sequences.
